diagrams.title: Three-Schema Architecture Pyramid
diagrams.description: Hierarchical representation showing three levels of database abstraction
diagrams.purpose: Understand the three-level architecture and data flow between levels

diagrams.title: Data Independence Flowchart
diagrams.description: Shows how changes at one level affect or don't affect other levels
elements: Change in Internal Schema → No effect on Conceptual (Physical Independence)
Change in Conceptual Schema → No effect on External (Logical Independence)
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how data independence protects different schema levels
